nodes.label: Base
nodes.description: The entry point to your elemental journey, granting access to all elemental paths.
nodes.effect: Grants access to summon small non-damaging instances of your element.

nodes.label: Buff / Doping I
nodes.description: Temporary self-enhancement techniques from various elements.
nodes.effect: Choose one elemental variation upon unlocking. You gain that buff ability.

Fire.title: Rage
Fire.description: Let fury drive your might, risking your sanity.
Fire.effect: Bonus action, 1/long rest. For 1 minute: +2 melee damage, advantage on STR checks/saves. Can’t cast spells or maintain concentration; vulnerability to psychic.

Ice.title: Frostbite
Ice.description: Sacrifice your own warmth to empower cold attacks.
Ice.effect: Bonus action, 1/short rest. For 1 minute: your cold damage deals +1d4 extra cold. At the end of each of your turns, you take 1d4 cold damage (cannot be reduced).

Lightning.title: Adrenaline Rush
Lightning.description: Push your reflexes to the limit, then crash.
Lightning.effect: Bonus action, 1/short rest. For 3 rounds: advantage on attack rolls and DEX saves. When the effect ends, gain 1 level of exhaustion.

Nature.title: Flowerfield
Nature.description: Create a blooming sanctuary that mends wounds.
Nature.effect: Action, 1/long rest, concentration up to 1 minute. 20-ft radius restorative bloom: any creature that starts its turn there regains 1d4 hit points.

Weird.title: Motivational Illusion
Weird.description: A trick of the mind that bolsters courage.
Weird.effect: Bonus action, 1/short rest. For 1 minute: gain 5 temporary HP and advantage against frightened. When the effect ends, if you still have those temporary HP, take 5 psychic damage.

Physical.title: Muscle Surge
Physical.description: Overcharge your muscles for a burst of power.
Physical.effect: Bonus action, 1/short rest. For 1 minute: STR +2 (max 22), speed +10 ft. When it ends, gain 1 level of exhaustion.

Wind.title: Tailwind Impact
Wind.description: Let the wind carry your strikes and leaps.
Wind.effect: Bonus action, 1/short rest. For 1 minute: when you hit with a weapon attack, you may push the target up to 10 ft. Jump distance doubled.

nodes.label: Buff / Doping II
nodes.description: Stronger buffs, often with a defensive or utility twist.
nodes.effect: Choose one elemental variation upon unlocking. You gain that stronger buff.

Fire.title: Life Burn
Fire.description: Sacrifice life force to ignite your strikes.
Fire.effect: Bonus action, 1/short rest. Take 1d4 irreducible necrotic damage. Until end of your next turn, weapon attacks and fire spells deal +1d4 fire damage.

Ice.title: Cold Head
Ice.description: Freeze your emotions, gaining mental clarity.
Ice.effect: Bonus action, 1/short rest. For 1 minute: advantage on WIS & INT saves, immunity to charmed and frightened.

Lightning.title: Lightning Reflexes
Lightning.description: Your nerves fire with electrical speed.
Lightning.effect: You always have advantage on initiative rolls.

Nature.title: Imbue Animal
Nature.description: Enhance a loyal beast with natural might.
Nature.effect: Action, 1/long rest. Touch a willing beast; for 1 hour (8 hours if your animal companion) it gains +2 AC, advantage on Perception, and +1d6 poison damage on its attacks.

Weird.title: Chaos Infusion
Weird.description: Embrace randomness to gain unpredictable power.
Weird.effect: Bonus action, 1/short rest. Roll 1d6 for a random 1-minute buff: 1: +2 AC; 2: +1d4 damage on all attacks; 3: fly speed 30 ft (hover); 4: resistance to all damage; 5: regain 2d8 HP at the start of each turn; 6: advantage on all attack rolls.

Physical.title: Iron Body
Physical.description: Harden your body like forged steel.
Physical.effect: Bonus action, 1/short rest. For 1 minute: resistance to non-magical bludgeoning, piercing, slashing, and advantage on CON saves.

Wind.title: Sirocco Step
Wind.description: Move like a desert wind, slipping past foes.
Wind.effect: Bonus action, 1/short rest. For 1 minute: movement doesn’t provoke opportunity attacks; you can move through hostile creatures’ spaces (difficult terrain).

nodes.label: Buff / Doping III
nodes.description: Major transformation or life-saving buff abilities.
nodes.effect: Choose one elemental variation upon unlocking. You gain a powerful once-per-rest buff.

Fire.title: Phoenix Flames
Fire.description: Cheat death with a fiery rebirth and retaliation.
Fire.effect: Reaction when reduced to 0 HP but not killed outright, 1/long rest. You instead regain 1d10+CON HP. Creatures within 10 ft make DEX save or take 2d6 fire. You stand up if prone. Transform all flames into healing flames for 3 turns.

Ice.title: Ice Armour
Ice.effect: Action, 1/long rest. For 1 hour: AC becomes 18 (if not higher), resistance to fire, vulnerability to bludgeoning from creatures larger than you, speed −10 ft.

Lightning.title: Ball Lightning
Lightning.description: Become a living lightning bolt, zipping through battle.
Lightning.effect: Bonus action, 1/long rest. For 1 minute: gain fly speed equal to walk speed (hover); you can move through creatures; each creature you pass through must make DEX save or take 3d6 lightning (once per creature).

Nature.title: Verdant Overgrowth
Nature.effect: Action, 1/long rest, concentration up to 1 minute. 30-ft aura: difficult terrain for enemies; at the start of your turn, up to 3 allies in the aura regain 2d6 HP.

Weird.title: Wild Mending
Weird.description: Twist fate to heal or harm yourself.
Weird.effect: Bonus action, 1/short rest. Roll a d20: 6–20: regain that many −5 HP (min 1). 1–5: take 5 psychic damage.

Physical.title: Adrenaline Overload
Physical.description: Push beyond mortal limits at great cost.
Physical.effect: Action, 1/long rest. For 1 minute: +4 STR & DEX (max 24), speed +20 ft, advantage on STR & DEX checks. After it ends, suffer 3 levels of exhaustion.

Wind.title: Eye of the Storm
Wind.description: Create a protective vortex of calm within chaos.
Wind.effect: Action, 1/long rest, concentration up to 1 minute. 10-ft radius, 20-ft tall cylinder: you and allies inside have resistance to ranged weapon attacks; enemies entering must make STR save or be pushed back 10 ft.

nodes.label: Attack I
nodes.description: Basic combat techniques – melee or short-range offensive boosts.
nodes.effect: Choose one elemental variation upon unlocking. You gain that attack ability.

Fire.title: Blazing Aura
Fire.effect: Bonus action, 1/short rest. For 1 minute: at start of your turn, creatures within 5 ft take fire damage equal to your proficiency bonus. Your melee attacks deal +1 fire damage.

Ice.title: Chilling Imbue
Ice.description: Coat your weapon with bitter cold.
Ice.effect: Bonus action, 1/short rest. For 1 minute: weapon attacks deal +1d4 cold; hit creature must make CON save or speed −10 ft until start of your next turn.

Lightning.title: Overcharge
Lightning.description: Overload your system for a quick second wind.
Lightning.effect: Bonus action, 1/short rest. On your next turn, you can take one additional action.

Nature.title: Wooden Arsenal
Nature.description: Grow wooden weapons and poison them.
Nature.effect: Bonus action, 1/short rest. For 1 minute: as a free action summon any wooden simple or martial melee weapon (you are proficient). The weapon deals +1d4 poison damage.

Weird.title: Bizarre Blast
Weird.description: Unleash a chaotic bolt of raw energy.
Weird.effect: Action, 1/short rest. Ranged spell attack, 60 ft. On hit roll a d8 for effect: 1: 2d6 acid, target can’t take reactions until next turn. 2: 2d6 cold, speed halved until next turn. 3: 2d6 fire, ignited. 4: 2d6 lightning, target loses any resistance until next turn. 5: 2d6 necrotic, you gain temp HP equal to damage dealt. 6: 2d6 psychic, target frightened until next turn. 7: 2d6 radiant, target blinded until next turn. 8: 2d6 thunder, pushed 10 ft.

Physical.title: Brute Force Strike
Physical.effect: Action, 1/short rest. Melee weapon attack: on hit, +2d6 weapon damage and target must make STR save or be knocked prone.

Wind.title: Gust Slash
Wind.effect: Bonus action, 1/short rest. For 1 minute: when you hit with a weapon attack, target makes STR save or pushed 15 ft + 1d6 bludgeoning.

nodes.label: Attack II
nodes.description: Moderate-power attack with a debilitating effect.
nodes.effect: Choose one elemental variation upon unlocking. You gain that attack.

Fire.title: Flame Wave
Fire.description: Sweep a fan of flames before you.
Fire.effect: Action, 1/short rest. 15-ft cone, DEX save: 3d6 fire (half on success). Ignites unattended flammables.

Ice.title: Glacial Spike
Ice.description: Hurl a massive ice shard that freezes in place.
Ice.effect: Action, 1/short rest. Ranged spell attack, 60 ft: 3d8 piercing + 1d6 cold, and target’s speed reduced to 0 until end of your next turn.

Lightning.title: Stunning Shock Imbue
Lightning.description: Charge your weapon to paralyze on impact.
Lightning.effect: Bonus action, 1/short rest. For 1 minute, the next time you hit with a melee weapon, target makes CON save or stunned until end of your next turn; then the imbue fades.

Nature.title: Tree Bomb
Nature.effect: Action, 1/short rest. 30-ft range, 10-ft radius growth (lasts 1 min). Creatures in area: DEX save or 3d6 piercing and restrained (action to escape, STR check).

Weird.title: Desperate Gamble
Weird.description: Risk it all on one capricious strike.
Weird.effect: Action, 1/short rest. Make one weapon attack. On a hit, roll d20: 11–20 = double damage; 1–10 = half damage. If you miss, take 1d10 psychic damage.

Physical.title: Crushing Blow
Physical.description: Deal a crippling strike that fractures defenses.
Physical.effect: Action, 1/short rest. Melee attack: +3d6 damage and target makes CON save or AC −2 until end of your next turn.

Wind.title: Vortex Kick
Wind.description: Launch foes into the air with a cyclone kick.
Wind.effect: Action, 1/short rest. 30-ft range, 10-ft radius: STR save or 3d6 bludgeoning, lifted 20 ft and fall prone. Half damage on success, no lift.

nodes.label: Attack III
nodes.description: Ultimate offensive ability, once per long rest.
nodes.effect: Choose one elemental variation upon unlocking. You gain that devastating attack.

Fire.title: Meteor Strike
Fire.description: Call down a blazing meteor from the sky.
Fire.effect: Action, 1/long rest. 120 ft range, 20-ft radius: DEX save for 8d6 fire + 4d6 bludgeoning (half on success). Ground becomes difficult terrain for 1 minute.

Ice.title: Blizzard Barrage
Ice.description: Unleash a localized blizzard that blinds all.
Ice.effect: Action, 1/long rest. 30-ft radius centred on you (you immune). Creatures CON save or 6d6 cold, blinded & deafened until end of your next turn; half on success. Area heavily obscured until then.

Lightning.title: Chain Lightning Storm
Lightning.effect: Action, 1/long rest. Up to 6 creatures within 60 ft, DEX save or 10d6 lightning; half on success. Afterward, you may teleport up to 30 ft as a bonus action.

Nature.title: Wrath of the Wild
Nature.description: Encase the area in a deadly thorn prison.
Nature.effect: Action, 1/long rest. 30-ft radius thorns (1 min, concentration): chosen creatures STR save or 5d6 piercing & restrained (escape action). Area is difficult terrain for enemies and half cover for allies.

Weird.title: Reality Fracture
Weird.description: Tear open a rift, banishing foes to a pocket dimension.
Weird.effect: Action, 1/long rest. 90 ft range, 15-ft radius: CHA save or 8d6 psychic and banished to a harmless demiplane until end of next turn (reappear prone). Half damage on success.

Physical.title: Titan’s Smash
Physical.description: Slam the ground with cataclysmic force.
Physical.effect: Action, 1/long rest. 20-ft radius slam: DEX save or 6d6 bludgeoning, knocked prone & stunned until end of your next turn; half damage, no stun on success.

Wind.title: Tempest Cyclone
Wind.description: Summon a raging cyclone that flings enemies.
Wind.effect: Action, 1/long rest. 120 ft range, 10-ft radius, 40-ft tall cylinder: STR save or 6d6 bludgeoning, flung 60 ft random direction & prone (half on success). Ranged attacks through the area have disadvantage until start of your next turn.

nodes.label: General Life I
nodes.description: Passive utility – social, mobility, or minor defensive boons.
nodes.effect: Choose one elemental variation upon unlocking. You gain that passive benefit.

Fire.title: Fiery Presence
Fire.effect: Proficiency in Intimidation; advantage on CHA (Intimidation). Creatures of your choice that start their turn within 5 ft take fire damage equal to your CHA mod (min 1).

Ice.title: Cool Aura
Ice.description: A calming presence that steels nerves.
Ice.effect: Advantage against frightened. As a reaction when a creature within 10 ft would be frightened, you can give it advantage on the save.

Lightning.title: Lightning Stride
Lightning.description: Move with the speed of a lightning bolt.
Lightning.effect: Base walking speed +10 ft. You can take the Dash action as a bonus action.

Nature.title: Tranquil Mind
Nature.description: Your thoughts are as serene as a forest.
Nature.effect: Advantage on WIS (Insight) and CHA (Persuasion) to calm or reason. Advantage on saves against charmed.

Weird.title: Odd Light
Weird.description: Manipulate light and shadows in strange ways.
Weird.effect: Cast light at will. As an action, make its glow produce silent minor illusion‑style images. You can see normally in magical darkness out to 30 ft.

Physical.title: Athletic Build
Physical.description: Your physique is honed for action.
Physical.effect: Proficiency in Athletics; carrying capacity doubled. You can attempt a grapple as a bonus action.

Wind.title: Wind Whisperer
Wind.description: The breeze tells you its secrets.
Wind.effect: Understand and speak Auran. Always know north; advantage on checks to avoid getting lost. Sense upcoming weather 1 hour in advance.

nodes.label: General Life II
nodes.description: Enhanced passive – often environmental adaptation or resource tool.
nodes.effect: Choose one elemental variation upon unlocking. You gain that enhanced passive.

Fire.title: Heated Activity
Fire.description: Body heat melts obstacles and wards off cold.
Fire.effect: Resistance to cold, ignore difficult terrain from ice/snow. Snap fingers to light small flames.

Ice.title: Ice Skater
Ice.description: Glide over ice and create slippery patches.
Ice.effect: Move across ice without penalty; climb vertical icy surfaces with speed = walk speed. Bonus action create a 10-ft icy patch (difficult terrain, DEX save or fall prone) within 30 ft, lasts 1 minute.

Lightning.title: Conductive Body
Lightning.description: Channel lightning into a defensive surge.
Lightning.effect: Resistance to lightning. When you take lightning damage, as a reaction gain temporary HP equal to half the damage (once per short rest).

Nature.title: Nature’s Boon
Nature.description: Live in harmony with beasts and nature.
Nature.effect: Cast speak with animals at will, no slot. Advantage on WIS (Survival) to track or find food.

Weird.title: Erratic Luck
Weird.description: Fortune warps oddly in your favor.
Weird.effect: Once per long rest, when you roll a 1 on an attack, check, or save, you can reroll and must use the new roll.

Physical.title: Sturdy Frame
Physical.effect: HP maximum increases by your level. When you roll a Hit Die to heal, regain additional HP equal to your CON mod.

Wind.title: Wind Rider
Wind.description: Air cushions your falls and leaps.
Wind.effect: Cast feather fall on yourself at will. Advantage on jump checks; running jump distance tripled.

nodes.label: General Life III
nodes.description: Mastery passive – significant permanent boon, often an immunity or legendary resilience.
nodes.effect: Choose one elemental variation upon unlocking. You gain that permanent boon.

Fire.title: Phoenix Blessing
Fire.description: A spark of immortality burns within.
Fire.effect: 1/long rest when reduced to 0 HP and not killed outright, drop to 1 HP instead. Immune to extreme heat.

Ice.title: Frozen Soul
Ice.description: Your soul is an unyielding glacier.
Ice.effect: Immunity to cold damage. Advantage on saves against illusion spells and effects.

Lightning.title: Evercharged
Lightning.description: You never tire, sustained by electricity.
Lightning.effect: You don’t need sleep and can’t be forced to sleep by magic. Advantage on saves against paralysed and stunned.

Nature.title: Heart of the Wild
Nature.effect: Can cast barkskin on yourself 1/long rest without a slot. Age at half rate, immune to disease.

Weird.title: Warped Mind
Weird.description: Your mind is a labyrinth of defiance.
Weird.effect: Resistance to psychic damage. When a creature tries to read your thoughts or deals psychic damage, it must make CHA save (DC = 8+prof+WIS or CHA mod) or be stunned until end of its next turn.

Physical.title: Indomitable Spirit
Physical.effect: When you fail a saving throw, 1/long rest you can choose to succeed instead. Treated as one size larger for lifting, pushing, dragging.

Wind.title: Zephyr Soul
Wind.description: You take to the skies like the wind.
Wind.effect: Gain a flying speed equal to your walking speed (if you end turn in air, you fall). Can’t be tracked by scent.

nodes.label: Spells I
nodes.description: At-will or rechargeable minor magic – essentially a cantrip or signature spell.
nodes.effect: Choose one elemental variation upon unlocking. You gain that magical ability.

Fire.title: Flame Burst
Fire.effect: Cantrip. 15-ft range, 5-ft radius burst, DEX save: 1d6 fire. Scales at 5th (2d6), 11th (3d6), 17th (4d6).

Ice.title: Frost Blade
Ice.description: Conjure a blade of solid ice.
Ice.effect: Cantrip. Bonus action summon an icy shortsword (cold damage, finesse). Disappears if released; only one at a time.

Lightning.title: Jolt
Lightning.description: Shock a foe and disrupt their reactions.
Lightning.effect: Cantrip. Melee spell attack, 1d8 lightning + target can’t take reactions until start of your next turn. Scales at 5th (2d8), 11th (3d8), 17th (4d8).

Nature.title: Vine Lash
Nature.description: A thorny vine lashes and pulls.
Nature.effect: Cantrip. Melee spell attack with 30-ft reach, 1d6 bludgeoning + 1d6 poison. Target must make STR save or be pulled 10 ft toward you.

Weird.title: Wild Conjuration
Weird.effect: 1/short rest. Summon a random creature for 10 minutes (d4): 1) celestial monkey (helpful), 2) invisible fey spirit that can distract, 3) tiny fire mephit, 4) illusory duplicate that can take the Help action.

Physical.title: Power Strike
Physical.description: Imbue your weapon with raw force.
Physical.effect: Cantrip. Bonus action imbue a weapon; next hit before end of turn deals +1d6 force damage. Scales at 5th (2d6), 11th (3d6), 17th (4d6).

Wind.title: Gust Burst
Wind.description: A burst of wind pushes foes back.
Wind.effect: Cantrip. 10-ft cone, STR save or pushed 5 ft + 1d4 bludgeoning. Scales at 5th (2d4), 11th (3d4), 17th (4d4).

nodes.label: Spells II
nodes.description: Short-rest based magical ability – often a utility or battlefield control.
nodes.effect: Choose one elemental variation upon unlocking. You gain that spell-like ability.

Fire.title: Fire Fist
Fire.description: Your fists burn with fiery fury.
Fire.effect: 1/short rest. For 1 minute: unarmed strikes add 1d6 fire; you can make one unarmed strike as a bonus action. You are proficient.

Ice.title: Ice Shaping
Ice.effect: Proficiency bonus times/long rest. As an action, create a simple ice object up to 5-ft cube (AC 13, 15 HP, vulnerable to fire). Lasts 1 hour.

Lightning.title: Defibrillator Jolt
Lightning.description: Attempt to revive the recently dead.
Lightning.effect: 1/long rest. Touch a creature dead no longer than 1 minute. Roll d20: 10+ it returns to life with 1 HP; 9− it takes 2d6 lightning and fails a death save if at 0.

Nature.title: Rapid Growth
Nature.description: Instantly grow thick foliage for cover.
Nature.effect: 1/short rest, concentration up to 1 minute. 20-ft square within 30 ft becomes difficult terrain and provides half cover.

Weird.title: Phantasm
Weird.effect: 1/short rest. Cast silent image without components; it can create minor sounds and acts realistically without concentration for 1 minute.

Physical.title: Crippling Strike
Physical.effect: 1/short rest. As an action, melee weapon attack: on hit +2d6 damage and target makes CON save or speed reduced to 0 until start of your next turn.

Wind.title: Gust Front
Wind.description: A wall of wind that pushes and deflects.
Wind.effect: 1/short rest. 30-ft line, 10 ft wide. STR save or pushed 20 ft + 2d4 bludgeoning; ranged attacks through the line have disadvantage until start of your next turn.

nodes.label: Spells III
nodes.description: Long-rest based powerful magic – a signature “big spell”.
nodes.effect: Choose one elemental variation upon unlocking. You gain that powerful spell.

Fire.title: Fireball
Fire.effect: 1/long rest. Cast fireball as a 3rd-level spell (8d6 fire, DEX save, 20-ft radius). Save DC = 8 + prof + your choice of INT/WIS/CHA.

Ice.title: Frost Spray
Ice.description: A cone of numbing frost that freezes the ground.
Ice.effect: 1/long rest. 30-ft cone, CON save or 6d8 cold (half on success). Ground becomes icy difficult terrain until start of your next turn.

Lightning.title: Lightning Beam
Lightning.effect: 1/long rest. 60-ft line, DEX save or 8d6 lightning (half on success). A creature that fails can’t take reactions until start of your next turn.

Nature.title: Call of the Wild
Nature.description: Summon beasts to fight for you.
Nature.effect: 1/long rest, concentration up to 1 hour. Summon a dire wolf, two giant spiders, or four swarms of ravens that obey your commands.

Weird.title: Chaos Wave
Weird.description: A wave of unpredictable, maddening energy.
Weird.effect: 1/long rest. 30-ft cone, CHA save. Roll 1d6 per target for effect: 1–2: 6d6 psychic + stunned until end of next turn (half damage on success, no stun). 3–4: 4d8 thunder + deafened (half damage, no deafen). 5–6: 4d10 necrotic + frightened (half damage, no frightened).

Physical.title: Earthquake Stomp
Physical.effect: 1/long rest. 20-ft radius centred on you (you immune); DEX save or 6d6 bludgeoning, knocked prone & restrained by rubble (action to escape). Half damage on success.

Wind.title: Tornado Blast
Wind.effect: 1/long rest. 120-ft range, 20-ft radius, 40-ft tall cylinder; STR save or 4d8 bludgeoning and lifted 30 ft (fall damage applies). Half damage on success. Disadvantage on ranged attacks in the area.
